rows.label: qev075203_MSG0001
rows.name:
That was close! You almost
got me in one fell swoop![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0002
rows.name:
How should I say it, your fighting style
resembles my master's. There's almost no
wasted movement in anything you do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075203_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod, agreeing that it is true.

rows.label: qev075203_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075203_SEL0021
rows.name: Smile wryly and say you're full of openings.

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0003
rows.name:
Unwavering confidence... That must be
what gives birth to those movements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0004
rows.name:
So you lure the opponent in like
that. Just like a guerrilla drawing
enemies into the forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you had been born in the hidden
village, you would have surely become
a fine member of the Hundred Hellions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev075203_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask for details about the hidden village.

rows.label: qev075203_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075203_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what the Hundred Hellions are.

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's the home of the Hundred Hellions where I grew
up. Located deep in an isolated forest... Everyone
devoted themselves to training day and night there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0007
rows.name:
They were the ultimate special forces unit that
continued to support the Lars, whose martial prowess
echoed across countless stars, from the shadows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Fundamentally, the Lars typically crush any
enemy through frontal assaults. But some guys
can't be defeated with standard tactics, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Hundred Hellions were called in during those times.
Forging their blades, hiding in the forest, launching
surprise attacks, they crushed troublesome foes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0010
rows.name:
That power... truly matchless for a thousand.
Once, just a hundred of them repelled an
army of thirty thousand, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0011
rows.name:
Proud warriors who continued to
support the glory of the Lars from
the shadows... They were my idols.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Oops! We're in the middle of a match!
Being in this forest just makes me remember
all sorts of things, I can't help it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075203_MSG0014
rows.name:
You won't find me easily next time! The
essence of the guerrilla tactics the Hundred
Hellions excel at... I'll show it to you![ST:wait ]
